Bash(git commit -m "feat: blueprint animation, Syne font, refined palette, remove emojis 🎨 PART 1: Blueprint Animation Background • Created blueprint-animation.html with architectural drawings animation • 3 animated layers: floor plans, elevations, and construction details • Uses refined #FF7A3D color palette with stroke animations • Replaced Three.js background with iframe-embedded blueprint animation 🔤 PART 2: Typography Update - Syne + Inter • Updated fonts from DM Serif Display + DM Sans → Syne + Inter • Syne for headings (400,500,600,700,800 weights) • Inter for body text (300,400,500 weights) • Added font-family CSS rules for h1,h2,h3,.hero-title → Syne • Updated all component font classes throughout landing page 🎨 PART 3: Color Palette Refinement • Primary accent: #E8650A → #FF7A3D (softer, more luminous) • Updated CSS variables in globals.css for both light/dark themes • Enhanced CTA buttons with gradient background and glow effects • Refined nav CTA button styling with rgba backgrounds 🚫 PART 4: Remove ALL Emojis → Clean SVG Icons • Replaced 6 feature card emojis with architectural SVG icons: - Planning: Calendar grid icon - Portal: Spotlight/connection icon - Reputation: Star rating icon - Communication: Chat bubble icon - Reports: Document with checkmark icon - Reserves: Alert circle icon • Updated icon containers with refined styling and #FF7A3D accent ✨ PART 5: Hero Text Refinement • Hero H1: clamp(44px, 6.5vw, 88px) with Syne 700 weight • Added line break for ''Gérez vos chantiers.
Votre réputation suit.'' • Enhanced badge styling with rgba(255,122,61,0.08) background • Refined subtitle with better color and spacing 🎯 PART 6: Feature Cards Architectural Styling • Sharp corners (border-radius: 0) for architectural feel • rgba(255,255,255,0.03) background with subtle borders • Enhanced hover effects with orange accent borders • Syne font for titles, refined spacing and colors 📊 PART 7: Stats Bar Enhancement • Enhanced with rgba(0,0,0,0.4) + backdrop-filter blur • Syne font for numbers (32px), refined label styling • Improved rgba borders for subtle separation 🛠 Technical Improvements: • Removed entire ThreeJSBackground component and Three.js dependency • Updated all font references from dm-serif/dm-sans → syne/inter • Enhanced button hover effects with inline event handlers • Consistent #FF7A3D color usage across all components • Clean build verification - all TypeScript/Next.js checks pass 🎯 Landing Page Transformation: • Professional blueprint animation background • Clean, emoji-free architectural aesthetic • Refined orange color palette (#FF7A3D focus) • Modern Syne typography for impact • Sharp, architectural UI elements 🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code) Co-Authored-By: Claude ")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Three.js blueprint animation + smaller hero text + compact CTAs

🎨 PART 1: Three.js Blueprint Animation Implementation
• Created BlueprintAnimation.tsx component with full Three.js integration
• Complex architectural wireframe house with progressive line drawing
• Dynamic CDN loading of Three.js (147KB) with proper cleanup
• Camera orbit animation + particle effects for depth
• Replaced iframe solution with native React component

📏 PART 2: Hero Text Size Reduction
• Hero H1: clamp(44px, 6.5vw, 88px) → clamp(28px, 4vw, 52px)
• Significantly smaller, more subtle headline as requested
• Maintains responsive scaling across all device sizes

🔘 PART 3: Compact CTA Buttons
• Primary button: padding 12px 28px → 8px 16px (33% smaller)
• Secondary button: padding 12px 22px → 8px 14px (35% smaller)  
• Font size: 14px → 12px for both buttons
• Icon size: w-4 h-4 → w-3 h-3
• Reduced gap between buttons: 4 → 3
• Smaller border radius: 8px → 6px for tighter appearance

🎯 PART 4: Enhanced Hero Layout
• Added 30vh padding top/bottom for breathing room
• Subtle radial gradient backdrop overlay for depth
• z-index layering: animation (0) → overlay (5) → content (10)
• Enhanced visual hierarchy with proper overlay effects

✅ Technical Improvements:
• Dynamic Three.js loading prevents SSR issues  
• Progressive animation system with proper cleanup
• Maintains existing blueprint aesthetic with Three.js power
• Zero build errors - all TypeScript checks pass
• Production-ready with optimized bundle size

🚀 Landing Page Transform Complete:
• Fixed broken iframe animation with robust Three.js solution
• Smaller, more refined hero text sizing
• Compact, professional CTA button sizing
• Enhanced depth and visual hierarchy
• Clean architectural aesthetic maintained

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
